name: branded-loading-onboarding
description: Validate the Smash Wall loading presentation, critical asset preload, and first objective waypoint.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local a=g.PunchWallClientAutomation a:Invoke('__ReplayLoading') task.wait(.25) local r=g.HeroCitySpawnReveal local title=r:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('TextLabel',true) local status=r:FindFirstChild('LoadingStatus',true) return H:JSONEncode({visible=r.Visible,active=r.Active,played=g:GetAttribute('SpawnRevealPlayed'),preloaded=g:GetAttribute('CriticalAssetsPreloaded'),assetCount=g:GetAttribute('CriticalAssetCount') or 0,failures=g:GetAttribute('CriticalAssetFailures') or -1,duration=g:GetAttribute('CriticalPreloadDuration') or 0,fist=r:FindFirstChild('LoadingFist',true)~=nil,track=r:FindFirstChild('LoadingTrack',true)~=nil,title=title and title.Text or '',status=status and status.Text or ''})

steps.label: loading screen and critical preload ready

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local spawn=workspace:FindFirstChild('Punch Rookie Spawn',true) p.Character:PivotTo(spawn.CFrame*CFrame.new(0,4,0)) return true

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke('__HideLoading') task.wait(.2) local w=g.TutorialWaypoint local h=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local objective=h:FindFirstChild('ObjectiveText',true) return H:JSONEncode({loadingHidden=not g.HeroCitySpawnReveal.Visible,objectiveReady=g:GetAttribute('OnboardingObjectiveReady'),step=g:GetAttribute('OnboardingObjectiveStep'),waypointReady=g:GetAttribute('OnboardingWaypointReady'),target=g:GetAttribute('OnboardingWaypointTarget'),waypointEnabled=w.Enabled,objective=objective and objective.Text or '',fits=objective and objective.TextFits or false})

steps.label: first objective and waypoint are readable
